description_long: This is a rectangular barn with a simple, modern design, set on a flat grassy base. The structure features a gable roof that runs the length of the building, providing a classic barn silhouette. The exterior is clad in a grid-patterned siding, giving it a contemporary appearance. The front facade has a central door flanked by two windows on each side, while the rear and side elevations have additional windows arranged in a regular pattern. The barn appears to be constructed primarily from prefabricated panels, likely metal or fiber cement, with large glass windows and a single main entrance. The overall look is clean and functional, suitable for agricultural or utility use in an urban or peri-urban context.
description: A modern rectangular barn with a gable roof, grid-patterned siding, and regularly spaced windows, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door centered between two pairs of windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow gable end with a single window and the length of the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with three evenly spaced windows and no visible door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other gable end with a single window.
attribute_door_style: single hinged door, centrally located on the front facade
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple rectangular windows, evenly spaced on all sides, with two pairs flanking the front door and three on the rear
